base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of peahat_rotate — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Peahat — flower-helicopter enemy. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Peahat — flower-helicopter enemy; 2-frame blade-spin while flying. Invulnerable while spinning, vulnerable when landed
